## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on the holiday publishing schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - **Strategy Validated:** Tavrn's "Medical Record Retrieval" blog secured the \#1 spot in Google's AI Overview, validating the content cluster strategy.
  - [**High Engagement:** Organic traffic is rising week-over-week, with key articles showing 83–91% engagement, proving strong search intent alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Double down on top-performing "Case-based" and "State-level Guide" content; expand into "Chronology" topics to support Tavrn's positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Holiday Plan:** Publishing continues through the holidays to maintain momentum; syncs are paused Dec 24 & 31 to accommodate time off.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy Validation

  - [**Google AI Overview Placement:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - The "Medical Record Retrieval, Best Companies" blog secured the \#1 spot in Google's AI Overview.
      - [**Significance:** This placement confirms Google views Tavrn as an authoritative source, a key goal of the content cluster strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Google's AI is also scraping content to position Tavrn as the "AI-powered" option, directly aligning with Pedro's external messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [**Organic Traffic & Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Organic traffic is growing week-over-week, even through the Thanksgiving holiday.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [High engagement rates prove strong search intent alignment:](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
          - ["Medical Record Retrieval Companies": **83%**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
          - ["Document Automation & Workflow" (product-centric): **91%**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**Pillar Performance & Roadmap:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Top Performers → Double Down:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
          - [**Case-based Content:** Highest volume driver.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
          - [**Legal Practice Ops (State Guides):** High-intent reference content (e.g., "Medical Malpractice Caps by State").](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**New Focus → Expand:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
          - [**Chronology & Summaries:** Expand this cluster to support Tavrn's positioning around modern AI-forward record retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Future Focus → Revisit in Q1:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
          - [**Legal AI Education:** Defer until authority in core areas is stronger.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### Holiday Publishing & Sync Schedule

  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
      - [**Week of Dec 22:** Publishing continues. Growth X will front-load articles to avoid a review backlog for Kellie.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Week of Dec 29:** Publishing is paused.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [**Sync Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
      - [Meetings are paused on **Dec 24** and **Dec 31**.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [**Reporting:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [A monthly performance report will be sent before year-end.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [A larger, comprehensive report is planned for January.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

## Next Steps

      - [Publish non-sensitive articles (e.g., "Colorado") this week.](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [**Kellie:**](https://fathom.video/share/cxrN-S4uPfBzzyfrxPSYyxtQrkZaA1oz?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
